name: Peanut Sesame Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a large baking sheet.
2. In a 2 quart glass measure or bowl, combine sugar, corn syrup and water.
3. Cook on high for 4 minutes. Stir in peanuts.
4. Cook for an additional 5 minutes; stir in sesame seeds, butter, and vanilla.
5. Cook for another minute until the mixture is light and foamy.
6. Stir in baking soda; the mixture will foam and boil up slightly.
7. Working quickly, pour the candy onto the greased baking sheet.
8. Spread the candy quickly to the edges using the back of a wooden spoon.
9. As the candy cools, stretch it out into a thin sheet with your palms.
10. Allow the candy to cool completely before breaking it into pieces.
11. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
